2.sql: SELECT teigid AS teig_id, kommunenummer, ST_Area(omrade::geography) AS area_m2, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig WHERE kommunenummer = '3301' AND ST_Area(omrade::geography) > 5000;

1.description: Retrieve Drammen municipality boundary to use as spatial filter

2.description: Retrieve parcels in Drammen larger than 5000 m², filtered by municipality boundary

3.description: Retrieve 200-year flood zones intersecting Drammen municipality

5.description: Sort parcels by area in descending order
